privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for webots_env configure_camera_sim_to_real task by confirming that the Webots scenario is synthetically generated via setup_task.sh. All expected parameters (noise 0.05, motionBlur 20.0, focalDistance 1.2, focalLength 0.02, and radialCoefficients [-0.3, 0.05]) and the target output path exactly match the task description instructions and are explicitly validated by the regex constraints in verifier.py.
